name: Mr. Green's Quiche Lorrainne Verte
recipeInstructions:
Chop green onions, including the tops.
Fry bacon until cooked through but not too crisp. Place in the bottom of the unbaked pie crust.
Arrange Swiss cheese strips in a crisscross pattern on top of the bacon.
Combine the remaining ingredients (except pimientos) in a blender until foamy. Pour the mixture into the piecrust.
Top with pimientos. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes.
